paper_title: Allergic Patients' Sera and Blood Samples, Timothy Grass Pollen Extract, Recombinant Allergens, Synthetic Peptides, and Antibodies

methods.description: Characterization of patients with grass pollen allergy and collection of serum and blood samples for further analysis.

steps.description: Patients with grass pollen allergy, as well as nonallergic control subjects, were characterized by case history and results of skin prick testing and measurement of specific IgE antibodies to recombinant grass pollen allergens (rPhl p 1, rPhl p 2, rPhl p 5, and rPhl p 6), as previously described.
steps.searchable_summary: characterize patients using case history, skin prick testing, and IgE antibody measurement

steps.description: Anonymized residual serum samples from these patients and from subjects without grass pollen allergy were used for serologic experiments with approval of the ethics committee of the Medical University of Vienna.
steps.searchable_summary: collect anonymized serum samples for serologic experiments

steps.description: Heparinized blood samples for T-cell proliferation and CD203c assays were obtained from patients with grass pollen allergy (NCT01350635) after informed consent was provided.
steps.searchable_summary: collect heparinized blood samples for T-cell proliferation and CD203c assays

methods.description: Preparation of recombinant grass pollen allergens and specific antibodies for experimental use.

steps.description: Recombinant grass pollen allergens were provided by Biomay AG. Timothy grass pollen extract was obtained from Stallergenes.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain recombinant grass pollen allergens and timothy grass pollen extract

steps.description: Phl p 2 and Phl p 6 peptides were synthesized and purified, as previously described.
steps.searchable_summary: synthesize and purify Phl p 2 and Phl p 6 peptides

steps.description: Rabbit antibodies specific for allergens (Phl p 1, Phl p 2, Phl p 5, and Phl p 6) or allergen-derived peptides were obtained by immunizing rabbits with purified recombinant proteins or with the KLH-coupled peptides (Charles River, Kissleg, Germany) 3 times in monthly intervals with 200 mg of antigen emulsified once in CFA and twice in Freund incomplete adjuvant.
steps.searchable_summary: immunize rabbits to produce specific antibodies

steps.description: Antibodies specific for PreS fusion proteins were raised by using the same CFA protocol and additionally by immunizing with aluminum hydroxide-adsorbed proteins (100 mg per injection for single fusion proteins or with the BM32 vaccine containing 40 mg of each of the 4 fusion proteins).
steps.searchable_summary: produce PreS-specific antibodies using CFA and aluminum hydroxide

methods.description: Purification and analysis of recombinant fusion proteins for experimental use.

steps.description: In both protocols the lysates were cleared by means of centrifugation (14,000 rpm for 20 minutes at 48C), and recombinant fusion proteins were purified by using nickel affinity chromatography (Qiagen, Hilden, Germany).
steps.searchable_summary: clear lysates and purify proteins using nickel affinity chromatography

steps.description: For proteins from inclusion bodies, elution was done with buffer II containing 8 mol/L urea (pH 3.5). Urea was removed by using dialysis either against 10 mmol/L Tris (pH 7.5) for PreS fusion proteins or against 10 mmol/L NaH 2 PO 4 (pH 4.8) for PreS.
steps.searchable_summary: elute proteins with urea buffer and remove urea by dialysis

steps.description: For purification under native conditions, an elution buffer containing 10 mmol/L Tris, 200 nmol/L NaCl, and 250 mmol/L imidazole was used, followed by ultrafiltration (Amicon Ultra 15; Merck KGaA, Darmstadt, Germany) for concentration of samples.
steps.searchable_summary: purify proteins under native conditions and concentrate samples

steps.description: The purity of recombinant proteins was analyzed by using SDS-PAGE and Coomassie staining.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze protein purity using SDS-PAGE and Coomassie staining

steps.description: Protein concentrations were determined by measuring protein-specific ODs as 280 nm and by using a BCA Protein Assay Kit (Novagen, Madison, Wis).
steps.searchable_summary: determine protein concentrations using OD measurement and BCA assay
